001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity;
002
003import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;
004import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;
005import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonPropertyOrder;
006import jakarta.persistence.Column;
007import jakarta.persistence.Entity;
008import jakarta.persistence.FetchType;
009import jakarta.persistence.GeneratedValue;
010import jakarta.persistence.GenerationType;
011import jakarta.persistence.Id;
012import jakarta.persistence.ManyToMany;
013import jakarta.persistence.Table;
014import jakarta.persistence.UniqueConstraint;
015import java.util.LinkedList;
016import java.util.List;
017
018/**
019 * JPA entity representing a category/tag that can be associated with an {@link IssueReport}.
020 */
021@Entity
022@Table(
023  name = "issue_type",
024  uniqueConstraints = {
025    @UniqueConstraint(name = "uk_issue_type_issue_type_tag", columnNames = "issue_type_tag")
026  }
027)
028@JsonPropertyOrder({"issueTypeTag", "issueTypeDescription"})
029public class IssueType {
030
031  @Id
032  @Column(name = "issue_type_id", nullable = false, updatable = false)
033  @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)
034  @JsonIgnore
035  private Long id;
036
037  @Column(nullable = false)
038  private String issueTypeTag;
039
040  @Column(nullable = false)
041  private String issueTypeDescription;
042
043  // used AI to help with ManyToMany annotation
044  @ManyToMany(mappedBy = "issueTypes", fetch = FetchType.LAZY)
045  @JsonIgnore
046  private final List<IssueReport> issueReports = new LinkedList<>();
047
048  /**
049   * Returns the database identifier for this issue type.
050   *
051   * @return primary key value.
052   */
053  public Long getId() {
054    return id;
055  }
056
057  /**
058   * Returns the issue type tag.
059   *
060   * @return issue type tag.
061   */
062  public String getIssueTypeTag() {
063    return issueTypeTag;
064  }
065
066  /**
067   * Sets the issue type tag.
068   *
069   * @param issueTypeTag issue type tag.
070   */
071  public void setIssueTypeTag(String issueTypeTag) {
072    this.issueTypeTag = issueTypeTag;
073  }
074
075  /**
076   * Returns the issue type description.
077   *
078   * @return issue type description.
079   */
080  public String getIssueTypeDescription() {
081    return issueTypeDescription;
082  }
083
084  /**
085   * Sets the issue type description.
086   *
087   * @param issueTypeDescription issue type description.
088   */
089  public void setIssueTypeDescription(String issueTypeDescription) {
090    this.issueTypeDescription = issueTypeDescription;
091  }
092
093  /**
094   * Returns the issue reports currently associated with this issue type.
095   *
096   * @return associated issue reports.
097   */
098  @JsonIgnore
099  public List<IssueReport> getIssueReports() {
100    return issueReports;
101  }
102}
